blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,055 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
